behavior_summary: This script implements the gameplay interactions for an east-west door object. Its handlers do not implement door logic locally but delegate to shared door routines in DOOR_NS.
U8P_DOOR_EW::look queries the door lock state (via DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked) to decide what description or feedback to present when the player examines the door.
U8P_DOOR_EW::use forwards player U8P_DOOR_EW::use actions (open/close/attempt entry) to DOOR_NS::useDoor.
U8P_DOOR_EW::gotHit forwards impact/hit handling to DOOR_NS::func0C82; parameter roles are present but not fully determined.
notable_control_flow: All observable logic flows are delegations: each local process immediately calls into a DOOR_NS routine and then yields/ends. There are no local flags, menus, or dialogue branches.

U8P_DOOR_EW::look performs a probe (checkDoorLocked) before returning a description — the probe's result likely conditions which description is shown, but that conditional logic is inside DOOR_NS or the engine's response to the probe.
open_questions: Does DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked return a boolean that the engine uses to select different U8P_DOOR_EW::look text, or does U8P_DOOR_EW examine the result to choose messaging? (appears likely but not visible in this excerpt)
What exact behaviors does DOOR_NS::func0C82 implement for a hit (breakable, play sound, apply damage, trigger an animation)?
What are the concrete meanings of the U8P_DOOR_EW::gotHit parameters (uword, word) — likely the hit source id and damage/impact value but confidence is low.

main_function.name: U8P_DOOR_EW::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to the player examining the east-west door by querying its locked state so the appropriate description or feedback can be presented.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_DOOR_EW::look' (examine) action on the door object.
May be triggered by the engine when the avatar is in the door's U8P_DOOR_EW::look/inspect interaction range.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_EW::look
function_map.role: Examine/description handler — probes the door lock state and yields a U8P_DOOR_EW::look response.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_EW::use
function_map.role: Forward player 'U8P_DOOR_EW::use' actions to the shared door U8P_DOOR_EW::use routine (DOOR_NS::useDoor).

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_EW::gotHit
function_map.role: Forward hit/impact events to the shared door hit handler (DOOR_NS::func0C82). Parameters present but roles inferred with low confidence.

external_calls.purpose: Query whether the door is locked so the engine or script can provide the appropriate U8P_DOOR_EW::look/description message.
Perform the actual door U8P_DOOR_EW::use/open/close/enter behavior; the local U8P_DOOR_EW::use() is a forwarding wrapper.
Handle impact/hit response for the door (damage, sound, animation, or other effects) — exact effects are not visible in this excerpt.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the gameplay interactions for an east-west door object. Its handlers do not implement door logic locally but delegate to shared door routines in DOOR_NS.
